$schema: Review-only off-site link evidence registry for breakyoursolarcontract.com.
_instructions: Each entry records an externally published page whose link should be verified; a row is not proof of placement, editorial endorsement, authority, or search impact.
`url` must be a public external HTTPS page. `target` must be an approved path currently present in the public sitemap.
Run `pnpm seo:backlinks` to check whether the page is reachable and contains the intended link. Use `--no-fetch` for offline registry validation.
Set `"status": "example"` on placeholder rows so they are skipped until you fill in a real url.
Do not add credentials, private URLs, paid-placement claims, authority metrics, or evidence-withheld destinations.

backlinks.notes: Placeholder only. Replace after editorial approval and verify the destination is still in the public sitemap.
